nonblocking_issues: Candidate pass rate 39.7% (282/711) falls below typical high-performance thresholds, but no policy requires a minimum candidate pass rate; performance does not block qualification.

score_evidence.mapping_audit: source 792 cases mapped 1:1 to oracle; sampled nodeids consistent with spec sections; no carrier dependency detected.

trust_boundary_note: Same-process pytest isolation does not guarantee adversarial modifications to the candidate cannot affect scoring; this is a required caveat.
